title: Jack Black Inventory
description: Adds Jack Black to your inventory (He lives there)
body: Are you a fan of Jack Black? Do you want him to live inside your Minecraft inventory? If you said yes, I think you'd like this resource pack! Jack Black Inventory replaces the normal inventory with a more jackblackified one.![Jack Black inside your inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6694abc525c2bbadd36b48ec2a326d151921763_0.webp)
